CommittedEffectDto.description:
A submit response DTO: the committed effect, frontier, and touched scopes.
Carries no replicated state. An identical replay returns the identical DTO.

effectB64.description: Base64 of the application effect bytes.

frontierRootHex.description: Hex of the 32-byte Replica frontier root.

scopeBodyIdsHex.description: Hex of the touched 16-byte Body ids.

CommittedEffectDto.title: CommittedEffectDto

ErrorDto.description:
The typed error DTO: a stable machine `code` (kebab-case) plus optional
human prose. Codes mirror the public error taxonomies; consumers match on
the code, never the message.

code.description:
One of the stable error codes (e.g. `invalid-request`, `denied`,
`unsupported-schema`, `authority-changed`, `request-id-conflict`,
`station-dormant`, `limit-exceeded`, `persistence`, `reset-required`).

ErrorDto.title: ErrorDto

ObservationCursorDto.description:
An observation cursor DTO. `sequence` is exclusive: replay delivers records
with a greater sequence.
ObservationCursorDto.title: ObservationCursorDto

ObservationDto.description:
An observation DTO — a bounded invalidation signal, carrying no state.
`reset: true` means the consumer must rebaseline and re-query.

scopeBodyIdsHex.description: Hex of the affected 16-byte Body ids (empty on reset).

ObservationDto.title: ObservationDto

ProjectionDto.description: A projection DTO — derived local output, never replicated state.
ProjectionDto.title: ProjectionDto

SignedSubmitDto.description:
A **signed** submit DTO: the canonical signed World action (postcard bytes,
opaque, produced and verified only by the Rust protocol layer) together
with the coordinates a consumer can read without decoding postcard. Every
spelled coordinate is validated against its identifier grammar; the signed
bytes are size-bounded and never interpreted at this layer — signature and
header verification happen in [`crate::action`], not in JSON.

actorId.description: The acting principal (`act_` + 64 lowercase hex chars).

deviceHex.description: The signing device key (64 lowercase hex chars).

requestIdHex.description: Hex (lowercase) of the action's 16-byte request id.

signedActionB64.description: Base64 (standard, padded) of the complete signed action bytes.

spaceId.description: The Space the action addresses (`ws_` + 26 base32 chars).

world.description: The World the action addresses (reverse-domain form).

SignedSubmitDto.title: SignedSubmitDto

SubmitRequestDto.description:
A submit request DTO. The application `payload` is base64 in JSON (arbitrary
bytes are not JSON-safe); everything else is a bounded string.

payloadB64.description: Base64 (standard, padded) of the application intent bytes.

requestIdHex.description:
Hex (lowercase) of the caller's 16-byte request id (the idempotency
scope component).

SubmitRequestDto.title: SubmitRequestDto

ActorId.description: Actor id: act_ + 64 lowercase hex chars (incept-event content address)

BodyIdHex.description: Body id: 32 lowercase hex chars (16 canonical bytes)

DeviceId.description: Device id: 64 lowercase hex chars (an ed25519 public key)

FrontierRootHex.description: Manifest frontier root: 64 lowercase hex chars (32 bytes)

RequestIdHex.description: Request id: 32 lowercase hex chars (16-byte idempotency scope component)

StationId.description: Station id in display form: 64 lowercase hex chars (the same key bytes as its DeviceId)

WorldId.description: World id: reverse-domain, >=2 labels of [a-z0-9-] with no leading/trailing hyphen, 3-63 chars
